news.title:
Several major stocks, including Kotak Bank, HUL, and Varun Beverages, hit 52-week lows amid extended losing streaks.
Notable corrections include Five Star Finance (-57%), Tata Motors PV (-55%), and Trent (-43%) from their respective 52-week highs.
news.summary:
Several major stocks, including Kotak Bank, HUL, and Varun Beverages, hit 52-week lows amid extended losing streaks.
Notable corrections include Five Star Finance (-57%), Tata Motors PV (-55%), and Trent (-43%) from their respective 52-week highs.

news.title:

This shift offers clearer exit paths for VC and PE investors.

India subsidiaries grow faster, with higher valuations than global parent entities.

news.title:
HUL CEO Priya Nair highlights India's strong consumption outlook with GDP growth, rising incomes, and 400M Gen Z consumers.
HUL targets growth via market segmentation, brand modernization, expanded distribution, and focus on beauty, personal care, wellness.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindustan Unilever reshuffled its wellness portfolio, exiting Wellbeing Nutrition for ₹307 Cr and fully acquiring OZiva for ₹824 Cr.
HUL shares traded at ₹2,239, down 1.04%, with market cap of ₹5,26,096.9 Cr, reflecting strategic focus on health segment.
news.summary:
Hindustan Unilever reshuffled its wellness portfolio, exiting Wellbeing Nutrition for ₹307 Cr and fully acquiring OZiva for ₹824 Cr.
HUL shares traded at ₹2,239, down 1.04%, with market cap of ₹5,26,096.9 Cr, reflecting strategic focus on health segment.

news.title:
CLSA warns Asian Paints, HUL, and Godrej Consumer may need steep price hikes if crude stays high.
ITC, Nestlé India, and Colgate India may require smaller hikes; high crude costs could pressure margins.
news.summary:

news.title:
HUL completes Rs 307 cr sale of 19.8% stake in Wellbeing Nutrition.
HUL shares likely to remain in focus post stake sale announcement.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindustan Unilever Ltd announces participation in Kotak Chasing Growth 2026 meet on Feb 25, 2026.
The meet will be a physical conference as per Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR.
news.summary:
Hindustan Unilever Ltd announces participation in Kotak Chasing Growth 2026 meet on Feb 25, 2026.

news.title:
Hindustan Unilever Ltd reported an Underlying Sales Growth of 5% and Underlying Volume Growth of 4% for the Dec 2025 quarter, with EBITDA at Rs. 3,788 crore (up 3%).
The company emphasized growth priorities with a focus on premiumization, quick commerce, and portfolio transformation, achieving highest-ever market shares in Home Care.
news.summary:
Hindustan Unilever Ltd reported an Underlying Sales Growth of 5% and Underlying Volume Growth of 4% for the Dec 2025 quarter, with EBITDA at Rs. 3,788 crore (up 3%).
The company emphasized growth priorities with a focus on premiumization, quick commerce, and portfolio transformation, achieving highest-ever market shares in Home Care.

news.title:
Consumer firms showed strong Q3 FY26 performance despite headwinds, with net sales growth at 10.4%, higher than Q1 and Q2.
Jubilant FoodWorks excelled in Q3 with 5% Domino's like-for-like growth, while GST cuts boost future consumption outlook.
news.summary:
Consumer firms showed strong Q3 FY26 performance despite headwinds, with net sales growth at 10.4%, higher than Q1 and Q2.
Jubilant FoodWorks excelled in Q3 with 5% Domino's like-for-like growth, while GST cuts boost future consumption outlook.

news.title:
FMCG firms like Hindustan Unilever, Tata Consumer, Dabur hike prices up to 5% due to rising costs.
